question_text: Let Ri(z) and Wi(z) denote read and write operations on a data element z by a transaction Ti, respectively. Consider the schedule S with four transactions. S : : : : : R4(x), R2(x), R3(x), R1(y), W1(y), W2(x), W3(y), R4(x) Which one of the following serial schedules is conflict equivalent to S?
